semantic.role: Documentation of the public API surface of ArchSpine, including CLI, MCP, and module entry points.
responsibilities: Lists all public CLI entry points (commands and flags)
Lists all public MCP entry points (tools, resources, prompts)
Lists all exported modules and their public symbols
Document is auto-generated and can be refreshed via `spine sync`
Serves as a single source of truth for public surface area
outOfScope: Internal implementation details of any entry point
Non-public or experimental APIs not yet stabilized
Configuration or environment variables that are not part of the public surface

English.purpose: This document provides a comprehensive map of the ArchSpine public surface, enumerating all CLI commands, MCP tools, and exported modules that are considered stable and part of the official interface.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers, integrators, and maintainers who need to know exactly what commands, tools, and modules are available for external use. The document is auto-generated and should be refreshed after any public API changes.
key_takeaways: Single authoritative reference for ArchSpine's public surface
Coverage includes CLI, MCP, and exported modules
Refresh via `spine sync` to keep in sync with actual implementation
Experimental view — review before relying on it in production

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档提供了 ArchSpine 公共接口的完整地图，枚举了所有被视为稳定且属于官方接口的 CLI 命令、MCP 工具和导出模块。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向需要精确了解哪些命令、工具和模块可供外部使用的开发者、集成者和维护者。本文档为自动生成，需在公共 API 发生变更后通过 `spine sync` 刷新。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine 公共接口的单一权威参考
涵盖 CLI、MCP 以及导出模块
通过 `spine sync` 刷新以与实际实现保持同步
实验性视图——在生产环境中依赖前请先验证
